name: Screenshot Machine
description: Simple website screenshot API. GET request with customer key + URL returns PNG/JPG/GIF. Supports desktop/phone/tablet emulation, full-page capture via the `dimension` param, delay, zoom, and cache control. Returns X-Screenshotmachine-Response header with error codes.

credential_fields.name: secret_phrase
credential_fields.label: Secret phrase (optional, required when calling from public sites)

tools.name: capture
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of a URL. Returns the rendered image binary. For full-page use dimension='1366xfull' (or similar width + 'full'). For fixed height use dimension='1366x768'.

dimension.description: Viewport dimension, e.g. '1366x768' or '1366xfull' for full-page

cacheLimit.description: Max cache age in days (0 = always fresh)

hash.description: md5(url + secret_phrase) signature, required when secret phrase is enabled

click.description: CSS selector to click before capturing

cookies.description: Cookies to set before loading the page

user.description: HTTP Basic auth username for the target site

password.description: HTTP Basic auth password for the target site
